'''[[King/Legends|King]] Natas Kyber''' was the ruler of the Imperial backwater world of [[Troska]].

==Biography==
As head of the [[Kyber Royal Family]], Natas often clashed with the local [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Garrison. Eventually, Imperial [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Treyz Manech]] hired an outside contracter, one [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to depose the local monarchy. Fett was successful, but left Natas alive, because of the size of the bribe he offered.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Overkill]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
